notes: Builds an interactive oversight framework and validates it via the 'sandwich' protocol: controlled comparisons against vibe-coding and vanilla-interaction baselines using LLM-based simulated users, plus a small real-user study (10 cases, hired non-expert) and human annotators for LLM-judge/simulator validation (human_subjects=true). Includes an ablation study and RL training of the interaction agent from online user feedback. Evaluation is largely LLM-simulated rather than large-scale human participants.
